records.summary: A listing page for Three Boons Yoga retreats offering multiple upcoming Jivamukti Yoga events across Europe in 2026, including locations in Mecklenburg, Rügen, Venice, and Sicily. The page leads with a lengthy philosophical introduction before presenting individual retreat cards.
records.where: Multiple locations: Mecklenburg, Rügen Island, Venice, Sicily
records.notes: This listing page buries all five key facts under a long philosophical intro, mixes four separate retreats without per-retreat pricing, and lacks a daily schedule or clear booking CTA at the top level.
